top_signals.title: Broadcom stock plunges 11% on weak software sales, unchanged AI chip forecast for the year
top_signals.summary: Broadcom reported fiscal second-quarter results on Wednesday and missed estimates for revenue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Inotiv, Breeder of Laboratory Animals, Files For Bankruptcy
top_signals.summary: Inotiv Inc., which breeds dogs and imports monkeys that are used in drug experiments, filed for bankruptcy in part on what it blamed are tighter rules on its US canine farm and tariffs on non-human primates raised in China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Seeks $75 Billion in Record IPO to Fund AI, Launch
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: This guidance establishes the concept of risk management.
